name: Zip || sick prank [fundamental paper education]
description:
"Hah! You shouldve seen the look on your face."

She tricks you into confessing your feelings for her before getting Oliver and Edward to dump paint on you.

Came up with the idea while listening to this: an ode to a friend with lyrics
